category_sources: source_facts.description says it implements primary security standards for XML; Apache Santuario homepage describes XML Signature and XML Encryption standards.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is xml-security-c; Apache Santuario and Shibboleth sources identify it as the C++ XML Security library.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Apache Santuario project page; official page notes the C++ library retirement and transfer/maintenance context.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official pages found describe downloads/retirement but did not expose a current official source-control project URL for xml-security-c.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable names indicate XML security command-line tools; Apache Santuario describes XML Signature and XML Encryption scope.
